s: In 2012, Mickey Storey suited up for HOU as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.860, WHIP 1.220, SO 34, WAR 0.500.
Changed teams after the previous season (HOU -> TOR).
In 2013, Mickey Storey suited up for TOR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.750, WHIP 1.750, SO 6, WAR 0.100. Notable context: Joined TOR.
